analysis.reasoning: Core message: Xi Jinping asserts that globalization and win-win cooperation remain the trend; China will deepen reform and opening-up, strengthen cooperation, promote an open world economy, and build a community with a shared future for mankind. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes; emphasizes cooperation, open world economy, mutual benefits, and explicitly mentions "community with a shared future for mankind," which matches the narrative description. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values in domestic context): Not directly; the focus is international role, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No claims about domestic achievements or leadership success. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: Only CH2 applies.
